description_long: This is a rectangular wooden table with a rich, dark cherry finish, featuring a smooth, flat tabletop and four sturdy, tapered legs. The table's edges are subtly beveled, adding a touch of classic elegance to its otherwise simple design. The legs are positioned at each corner and have a slight decorative contour near the top, giving the table a refined appearance. The surface is polished, reflecting light softly and highlighting the natural wood grain. There are no visible drawers, handles, or additional components, emphasizing its straightforward functionality. The overall construction suggests durability and suitability for both dining and work purposes in urban environments.
description: A rectangular, dark cherry wood table with a smooth, polished surface and four tapered, decorative legs. The design is classic and sturdy, with subtle beveled edges and no additional features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the rectangular tabletop and all four tapered legs, with decorative contours visible at the top of each leg.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the table's length and the slim profile of the tabletop, with two legs visible and the beveled edge detail more pronounced.
description_view_2: Rear view identical to the front, displaying the full width and all four legs, mirroring the front's decorative features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the table's length and slim tabletop profile with two legs visible.

license_info.creator_display_name: 杭州维界科技有限公司
